target: Yeah, no problems. It looks like it'll be fine to keep going this way.
Alright, then let's get Nagumo-sensei and the others over here.
Hey, Straw. Is it okay to keep going?
(I guess it really is hard to convey everything we say…)
Something's coming at us really fast!
Could it be… this presence is...?!
Yeah…! There was no presence at all until just a second ago, but she caught up in a flash!
But it seems she hasn't figured out our exact position yet.
I see…! I hope we can somehow let her pass by…
Nagumo-sensei, be careful! Haine is approaching from behind!
That's what I'm saying! Haine is approaching from behind!
Haine, behind… Haine is coming from behind us…?
Who are you talking to? Is it that 'straw' again?
Straw says that girl… Haine is approaching…
A girl in a red kimono… She's the one who did this to my legs.
A red kimono? What, were you attacked by a human?
That's hard to believe… I saw the boy's wounds, and those aren't the kind of marks a human could make.
No matter how you look at it, it just looks like he was torn apart by some kind of wild dog.
Ryunosuke, that's enough, so stay quiet. Right now you need to conserve whatever strength you have left.
Nagumo-sensei, Haine is right nearby! Please hide!
Hide? Are you telling us to hide?
Haine is probably nearby. For now, let's hid—
Wh-What was that speed…? That's way beyond just being superhuman.
Her build is that of a child, but—
With those superhuman movements, it makes sense that she could inflict such deep wounds on the boy's legs.
But I saw it… You attacking Ryunosuke.
I don't… know… I don't… know…
Doesn't she… seem a bit strange?
What do you mean you don't know? Did you attack Ryunosuke for no reason?
Get back! Don't come any closer!
Boy… If danger approaches, I'll carry you on my back and we'll head straight for the hospital.
(With Ryunosuke in this condition… we can't afford to carelessly provoke Haine right now.)
(Look at the big picture! At this rate, not just Ryunosuke, but Nagumo-sensei and Nezu-san will be in danger too.)
(But at this distance, even if they run, she'll catch up to them immediately.)
If we could just find some way to stop Haine's movements…
No… let's not. We might just end up provoking her.
That's it! If Nagumo-sensei can hear us, maybe Haine can too!
We have to somehow buy time with our voices!
Looks like that's our only option. Yeah, let's try it!
What are you standing around for?! Get away from that thing!
Haine! Are you really okay with this?!
Is satisfying your hunger right here really what you want?!
It's reaching her…! Our voices are reaching Haine!
Aaaaah, I don't know! I don't know anything anymore!!
This is impossible! Hizuru-san, hurry up and run!
It's our birthday… Why did this have to happen…!
I couldn't… go on anyway. That's why… Ugh!
There's no way I can do that!
I agree. It'll be a piece of cake to hold down a little girl like this.
You saw how she moves, right? She's not normal…!
True… There's a possibility she's the same as the shadow we fought earlier.
Nezu-san… Please. If something happens to my sister too…
What are you saying! There's no way I can leave you behind, Ryunosuke!
Understood. Leave the rest to me.
Put me down! Put me down!!
Be quiet! Do you want us all to get killed and ruin the boy's sacrifice?!
Why… why did it turn out like this…
Am I just powerless in the end? Can I not change anything…?
Hey, Shinpei! This is no time to be crying!
There's no way we're powerless! If you lose your nerve, it's all over!
There might still be things we need to see, things we need to confirm.
Yeah, let's go after Nagumo-sensei and Nezu-san.
With the time Ryunosuke-san bought us, I need to properly see things through for Hizuru-san and Nezu-san.
